findings.description: Source h2 section「ウェブアプリケーション Thymeleafアダプタを使用するための設定を行う」contains a h3 subsection「処理対象判定について」(~~~~ underline) and the combined source content well exceeds 2000 characters. The knowledge file did not split this into a separate section ID; instead, it embedded a markdown `## 処理対象判定` heading inside s2's content string. Per the V3 rule, a split section should have been created.
findings.source_evidence:
RST source has `処理対象判定について
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~` as a h3 under the h2 configuration section, covering multiple paragraphs, two code examples, and an important warning block.

findings.description: The interface name `ITemplateResolver` is referenced in the source tip explaining why `ServletContextTemplateResolver` cannot be registered, but it is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source tip: ``ITemplateResolver`` インタフェースの実装クラスに、``org.thymeleaf.templateresolver.ServletContextTemplateResolver`` が存在するが…
